full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Design two ablations for Logical-Shapelets: one component at a time.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Suggest two independent ablations for the Logical-Shapelets method: remove or simplify one component each (e.g. logical AND, or search space), and compare performance with the full method.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested logical combination and search range as ablation targets; I implemented eval_accuracy, eval_accuracy_maxlen, and plots.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I ran the notebook and verified the figures save to results/.

top_5_prompts.why_important: Guided Task 3.1 design; I implemented and interpreted the experiments.
